name: Suspicious File Creation in Trend Micro Apex One Web Console Directory
description: Detects creation or modification of files within the Trend Micro Apex One Web Console crypt directory, except for legitimate files (crypt.key, readme.txt). This may indicate exploitation of CVE-2025-54948 to drop or modify files in protected web server directories.

filterSets.name: Suspicious File Creation in Trend Micro Apex One Web Console Directory

author: Colin Crowley, Marc Lanzendorfer
